batch_summary.note: Valentine's Day mega-cluster: EP-0219 Feb 14 2023 (104 msgs, FLOOD). First mega-cluster in dataset. ADD-003 Valentine's Day temporal window confirmed. Eli makes multiple de-escalation attempts within the 104-message exchange; Melissa does not acknowledge any — de-escalation resistance confirmed within a single extended episode. ARC-RF13-003 promoted to ACTIVE.

primary_flags.escalation_shape: ramp — sustained hostile escalation across 104-message exchange

delta_profile.sent_direction: multiple de-escalation attempts within episode (measured responses, logistics redirects, shorter messages)
delta_profile.received_direction: sustained hostile escalation across 104 messages; multiple DARVO sequences within episode (RF-04 co-flags)
delta_profile.net_escalation: high (Sev-2: 104-msg mega-cluster with confirmed de-escalation resistance within episode)
delta_profile.de_escalation_resistance: CONFIRMED WITHIN-EPISODE: Eli makes de-escalation attempts at multiple points; Melissa escalates or ignores each attempt and continues hostile trajectory

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-003 — Valentine's Day temporal window (Feb 14-15). First confirmed within-episode de-escalation resistance (vs. between-episode in prior batches).
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: EP-0219 contains RF-04 primary flags (Sev-1, B-005: 2 flags). RF-04/RF-13 compound: DARVO sequences within the mega-cluster maintain escalation despite Eli's attempts to return to logistics.

arc_updates.event: EP-0219 (104 msgs) is first mega-cluster. Trajectory escalating significantly — from 5-48 msg hostile episodes to 104-msg sustained hostile exchange.

Within-episode de-escalation resistance confirmed: Eli attempts de-escalation multiple times across 104-message exchange; Melissa escalates past each attempt. This is the strongest de-escalation resistance evidence to date. ARC-RF13-003 ACTIVE.
